description: A shipping clerk has picked all items for a customer order and needs to generate the packing slip.

nodes.task_description: Identify the sales order that has been picked.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct sales order from the list of picked orders.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all items and quantities on the order have been picked.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the picked quantities match the order quantities.

nodes.task_description: Generate and print the official packing slip for the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates and prints the document.
